channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting says he resigned because Labour ‘in fight of our lives against nationalism’, and is currently losing – UK politics live
item.description: Streeting says he resigned because Labour ‘in fight of our lives against nationalism’, and is currently losing – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer under fire for buying ‘dirty Russian oil’ after UK quietly eases strict sanctions
item.description: Starmer under fire for buying ‘dirty Russian oil’ after UK quietly eases strict sanctions

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer postpones fuel duty increase
BBC Politics: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
item.description: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs

item.title: LabourList: Labour cannot waste time 'treading water' in government, warns Streeting
item.description: Labour cannot waste time 'treading water' in government, warns Streeting

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour must be bolder or it will lose, Streeting says in resignation speech
item.description: Labour must be bolder or it will lose, Streeting says in resignation speech

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Labour losing fight against nationalism and risks handing victory to Reform, Streeting warns
item.description: Politics latest: Labour losing fight against nationalism and risks handing victory to Reform, Streeting warns

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: 1) Honestly just how much money do the Starmer fanboys in my mentions think I earn? 2) Inflation is still above both target and where it was in April 2024, and we unfortunately have a Trump-made shock still coming dow...

item.title: i Politics: The three areas where GPs will stop writing sick notes - and what will replace them
